text:
The Strange Chicken (ヘンナトリ, Hen'natori) is a type of Magical Beast that's native to Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Strange Chicken is part of the Midonite fauna and drops the Strange Chicken Meat that is requested by the Gourmet Hunter Menchi for her sidequest. 

References
